item.description: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks with the highest upside potential. On April 23, Microsoft Chairman and CEO Satya Nadella, alongside Prime Minister Anthony Albanese, announced an A$25 billion investment to expand Australia’s digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, and AI skills by the end of 2029. This represents the company’s largest-ever investment in […]
item.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Announces A$25B Investment in Australia’s AI and Cloud Infrastructure

item.description: The stock market is at highs but results and spending for Apple, Amazon, Google and more will be key. Iran talks were called off.
item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Tech Stocks, Oil Prices Rise Amid Iran News; Apple, Amazon, Google Lead Earnings

item.description: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, Microsoft, and Sam Altman is moving toward trial, challenging OpenAI's shift from nonprofit roots to a profit-driven structure. The case raises questions about Microsoft's role as a major OpenAI partner and investor, along with issues around governance and control in large AI collaborations. The outcome could influence how AI partnerships are structured and how regulators and the public view Big Tech involvement in advanced AI development. For Microsoft...
item.title: Musk OpenAI Lawsuit Puts Microsoft AI Partnership And Governance Under Spotlight

item.description: ​Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is one of the Best Stocks to Buy While the Market Is Downn. ​The Street is bullish on Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) as 70% of the 30 analysts covering the stock have a Buyy rating. Moreover, the average 12-month price target suggests more than 26% upside from the current level. ​​Recently, on April […]
item.title: Here’s Why Accenture (ACN) Is a Good Stock to Buy While the Market Is Down

item.description: ​Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of the Best Stocks to Buy While the Marrket Is Down. ​On April 16, Reuters reported that Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) and Stellantis have enttered a five‑year strategic partnership. As part of this collaboration, Stellantis will rely heavily on Microsoft’s cloud, AI, and cybersecurity expertise to modernize its digital and engineering […]
item.title: Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) Partners With Stellantis

item.description: (Bloomberg) -- April’s rally in risk assets has weathered stalled peace talks, signs of resurgent inflation and a central-bank succession drama. item.description: Is S a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on SentinelOne, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by PerformanceProof6161. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on S. SentinelOne, Inc.’s share was trading at $14.32 as of April 20th. S’s forward P/E was 42.19 according to Yahoo Finance. SentinelOne, Inc. operates as a cybersecurity provider in the United States and […]
item.title: Is SentinelOne, Inc. (S) A Good Stock To Buy Now?

item.description: Both of these tech titans are riding the artificial intelligence wave, but one of them seems like a better long-term investment than the other.
item.title: Microsoft vs. Broadcom: Which AI Stock Is a Better Buy?

item.description: On Sunday, prediction market Kalshi traders kept repricing the contract on whether Elon Musk wins his lawsuit against OpenAI, with the market swinging between near coin-flip levels and deeper doubt as the April 28, 2026 trial date closes in. The prediction markets are signaling a toss-up in Elon Musk’s legal battle against OpenAI. On Kalshi, traders have pushed the odds to nearly 45%, suggesting growing belief that Musk could prevail in his lawsuit against the AI company he co-founded. The chopp
item.title: Elon Musk vs. OpenAI: Kalshi Traders Push Odds to 45% as Trial Date Approaches

item.description: Dan Ives just made a massive call that cuts straight through the noise on tech stock volatility. In an appearance on CNBC this week, the Wedbush tech analyst delivered an urgent message, layering his unshaken AI thesis onto a powerful signal. Despite the market’s sluggishness, Ives predicts tech ...
item.title: Veteran analyst delivers surprise message on tech stocks

item.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Cramer noted that the stock has been “doing nothing,” as he said: Or how about a stock I talked about earlier in the week that’s doing nothing, JNJ. Johnson & Johnson, AAA balance […]
item.title: Jim Cramer Says Johnson & Johnson “Has the Best Pipeline of Potential Blockbusters”

channel.item: (Bloomberg) -- Wall Street’s biggest technology stocks have carried the S&P 500 to record highs even as the war in Iran continues.
